Off Calendar Oct-26-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Paul S. Rosenlund, Esq. of DUANE MORRIS, LLP (415-957-3178), appearing for defendant / moving party West Marine Products, Inc.
James P. Nevin, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Giovanni Colombo

RULING:
DEFENDANT WEST MARINE PRODUCTS, INC.'s MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Argued and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant West Marine Products, Inc.'s motion for summary judgment is denied and its alternate motion for summary adjudication is granted as to the loss of consortium claim, denied as to the negligence and strict liability claims and taken off calendar as to the false representation claim and request for punitive damages. Plaintiff's deposition, plaintiff's declaration and the declaration of Mr. Ay create a triable issue whether plaintiff was exposed to an asbestos-containing gasket attributable to defendant. Defendant's objections to plaintiff's deposition, plaintiff's declaration and the declaration of Mr. Ay are overruled. Defendant did not satisfy its burden of production on the issue of whether plaintiff has an asbestos-related illness. Although the complaint appears to allege a loss of consortium claim, there is no basis for such a claim since Mr. Colombo is the sole plaintiff. Plaintiff has dismissed his false representation claim and request for punitive damages against defendant. See reporter's notes for details of the Court's ruling on defendant's objections. Order denying the motion, and order on defendant's objections were signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 = (220/HEK)
